## LEGISLATURE ATTEMPTS TO RAISE AT LEAST $83 MILLION MORE IN TAXES
May 10, 2018 Montpelier, Vt. – Governor Phil Scott today issued the following statement: “As too many of our families and businesses are aware, the affordability crisis is real. Its undermining the economies in most counties across the state. Working to reverse this trend is one of the primary reasons I ran for governor. “Since taking office, I’ve talked a lot about how important it is to moderate the costs in state government as we work to grow the economy, make Vermont more affordable and modernize state government so we are getting more value out of every hard-earned taxpayer dollar – all of which ensures we can continue to protect the most vulnerable. “My fiscal and economic priorities could not be clearer: Vermonters need a break. Yet the legislative majority continues to advance legislation that proposes millions of dollars in new or higher taxes and fees, knowing it will lead to impasse. “Last year – with the support from a bipartisan group of legislators focused on affordability – we prevented millions of dollars in proposed taxes and fees by insisting on a budget that did not raise a single tax or fee. “Currently, the legislative majority has either passed or is poised to pass a total of $83 million in new or higher taxes – $25 million of taxes in policy bills and a $58 million property tax rate increase. “Again, this approach is unacceptable to me. And based on what I’ve heard over the last two years, it is unacceptable to most taxpayers. “Vermonters understand we can’t make our state more affordable by making it more expensive. They also understand it’s going to take consistent fiscal discipline, and much more innovation and modernization in government, to strengthen our economic foundation and help families and employers get ahead of the additional tax burden previously placed on them. “I want to thank the Republican minority and the fiscally responsible Democrats and Independents in both the House and Senate for sharing this commitment. We are prepared to stand together again this year to make Vermont more affordable and our economy stronger. Frankly, this reality makes the effort to pass a budget they know we will not support – and that I will veto – an unnecessary waste of time and resources. “If the majority leadership will focus on ways we can achieve bipartisan consensus that ensures state government is living within its means, making investments that will grow the economy and doing its part to help Vermonters keep more of what they earn, then this session can end on a positive note.” ###

MAY 10, 2018 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Caitlin Carlisle, Communications Director caitlin.saccone@gmail.com/405-431-0267
# **Rick Saccone: Campaigning Against Lies and Deceit in PA-14**
Canonsburg, PA --By now it has been established that Conservatives for PA is a fraud. It is neither conservative nor truthful.Conservatives for PA and my opponent are working together to mislead you about my record. However, that's what desperate candidates and groups do when their campaigns are failing and they are trailing in the polls.In the most recent blatantly false Conservatives for PA television ad, they claim my opponent has an "A+ from the NRA." Once again Conservatives for PA is playing fast and loose with the truth.The truth is my opponent only holds an "A" www.nrapvf.org/grades/Pennsylvania/ and I am the only Republican candidate in this race with an "A+" from the NRA.I am also the only candidate in this race to be endorsed by Firearms Owners Against Crime (FOAC). My opponent is not, due to his inferior record on protecting our 2nd Amendment rights.Unfortunately, this is not the only time those working against me have been caught lying. Recently, my opponent disavowed writing a foreword for a racist and bigoted book by Carl Higbie, claiming he didn't read the book before authoring the foreword.However, this was not the case. Not only did my opponent read the book, he publicly commented on sections of the book during podcast with the author. This episode of my opponent once again playing fast and loose with the truth was documented by CNN: [https://www.cnn.com/2018/05/07/politics/kfile-gop-candidate-carl-higbie/index.html](http://ricksaccone.cmail19.com/t/j-l-burdrdd-ykkrijcdu-r/).The people of the 14th Congressional District deserve a Congressman who will always tell the truth; not one who has been caught in lies or being supported by a deceitful outside interest group.**Dr. Rick Saccone is a decorated USAF veteran, a political science professor at St. Vincent's, and an expert in counter-terrorism who served his country in North Korea and Iraq. He holds his Ph.D. in International Affairs and graduate degrees in national security and public administration and has written nine books, two regarding North Korea. Rick and his wife Yong have two sons who are captains in the Air Force. The Saccones have been lifelong residents of Elizabeth, PA.**Paid for by Rick for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://ricksaccone.cmail19.com/t/j-u-burdrdd-ykkrijcdu-y/)

| | Dear Friend, **Check out this press release about our big endorsement from former Idaho Governor Dirk Kempthorne!** **FORMER IDAHO GOVERNOR, U.S. SENATOR, AND DEPARTMENT OF INTERIOR SECRETARY DIRK KEMPTHORNE ENDORSES DAVE LEROY FOR CONGRESS** **BOISE, ID (May 10, 2018)** – Governor Dirk Kempthorne strongly endorses Dave Leroy for Idaho’s First District seat in the U.S. House of Representatives.
“Dave is the right candidate to represent the rights and needs of Idaho in Congress,” said Governor Kempthorne. “Dave has an understanding of the citizens of this state which comes from decades of experience serving Idaho as Attorney General, Lieutenant Governor and as an attorney protecting the rights of Idahoans. Dave’s outstanding experience makes him uniquely positioned to fight for Idaho’s conservative values.” Throughout his service to Idaho, Governor Kempthorne focused on protecting state sovereignty while helping Idaho grow a healthy economy through investment in infrastructure, business and education. As U.S. Senator, he sponsored successful legislation prohibiting Congress from imposing unfunded mandates on the states. Just last December, he told the Associated Taxpayers of Idaho to “...not spend one penny more than absolutely necessary of the precious dollars of the taxpayer.” “I have been blessed to have a strong relationship with Governor Kempthorne, a man who has done so much for our great state,” said Dave Leroy. “Like him, I have a depth and breadth of experience from serving Idahoans that is unparalleled by any of my competitors. Like him, I do not believe in lifetime appointments to Congress, and will limit my service to just six years. Like him, I know that Congress needs to pass legislation that protects Idahoans’ way of life, by safeguarding our state’s rights, securing our borders, and defending our Second Amendment rights. I am honored to have his endorsement of me and grateful for his confidence in my ability to fight for Idaho.” _Both Kempthorne and Leroy study history and are especially appreciative of the role of Abraham Lincoln in preserving the Union. Both men are former Student Body Presidents at the University of Idaho. Learn more about Dave Leroy at leroyforidaho.com. _ ### In Liberty, Jordan Watters Leroy for Idaho

Abigail's candidacy has been exciting to watch; she's brought a wave of enthusiasm to a district that has historically given Democrats little reason for optimism. name: The White House
subject: The First Family’s welcome to Military mothers and spouses
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dfe0b8533c22b2ea76b8f59556efd8355873e45dbf001c8a9ed8474309cb40fd160ae31a21603fc198b6fa2e3a7e540abe347d19be9bd37) The White House • May 11, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will announce his plan to lower drug prices for Americans. Under his leadership, the Food and Drug Administration’s emphasis on generic drug approvals contributed to prescription drug buyers saving $8.8 billion last year. [Watch live at 2 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dfe0b8533c22b2ec0e33729f93628a3287c674eada30e1543d598060a3677506214dd30044316bb905a2576727017050626047177428ecd) |
---
|

## The First Family’s welcome to Military mothers and spouses
**“As a mother myself, I know what goes into raising a child,”** First Lady Melania Trump told a group of Military mothers and spouses gathered at the White House this week. “Mother’s Day, which is this Sunday, is celebrated just one time per year. . . . But I think mothers should be celebrated each and every day.”
**Military mothers, spouses, and families have an important and sometimes challenging role.** “You endure long separations during deployments, and some of them are much longer than you ever bargained for,” President Trump said. “You routinely move your families around the country and all over the world. You maintain morale in your family and across the military community.”
**So the President is taking action to help**. On Wednesday, he signed an Executive Order to enhance opportunities for military spouses looking for employment in the Federal Government. Beyond the stress of having to move frequently due to deployments, military spouses often have to deal with job searches hampered by state regulation.
[Learn more about the President’s Executive Order for Military families](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dfe0b8533c22b2eed605f16228fbdf0fd00ed688e9d32a2ec8e39376984772138da5faec90ae023f1548b5df43976c95632006859c80065).
**More** : [President Trump declares today as “Military Spouse Day.” ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dfe0b8533c22b2eb685dfa7c73568b2a9fbf30e5f9628758d9dc738de43b0b95b850f76e45d842e14d74a7a4dc288325e2128627c20f904)

---
|

## The Iran deal was betrayed by its own record
**This week, President Trump withdrew America from the flawed Iran nuclear deal**. Writing in _The Washington Post_ , National Security Adviser John Bolton explained why the agreement failed. Its intent was to prompt Iran to trade nuclear ambitions for economic incentives. “But rather than focusing on behaving responsibly, Tehran has poured billions of dollars into military adventures abroad,” he writes.
**“The future of Iran belongs to its people,”** President Trump said. _The Wall Street Journal_ agrees. “Mr. Obama sought to win over the Tehran regime by avoiding confrontation,” the _Journal’s_ editors wrote in January. “Mr. Trump, by contrast, has distinguished between the regime and the Iranian people, much as Ronald Reagan did with the Soviet Union.”
**John Bolton:[The Iran deal was betrayed by its own abysmal record. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dfe0b8533c22b2e2390c7d56900fd575ee82df00f7c1815ac52014674035032456110d35d0dfda4b839eb939757d74efdf22a9fa39ff383)
**More** : [Read WSJ’s January editorial about President Trump, Ronald Reagan, and Iran.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2dfe0b8533c22b2e3815127c621f9a9ca2feaedeae76e0225a487fae5d3f5dff1286cd6277b46c5a29783de03a2a31a468f9a8e6f013cee8)

---
|

name: Tom Perez
subject: [MEMO] 2018 strategy update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
With fewer than six months to go until Election Day, I wanted to give you an update on the Democratic Party's 2018 strategy.
---
With fewer than six months to go until Election Day, I wanted to give you an update on the Democratic Party's 2018 strategy.

The Democratic gains we need to take back control of Congress and flip state legislatures are going to take an incredible amount of work -- but they're within reach.

That's why I'm excited to share three key programs that will help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year:

### 1\. IWillVote
An ambitious plan to reach 50 million American voters between now and Election Day. Together we'll ask people to commit to vote, help them register, provide voter education and protection, and make sure they cast their ballot.

### 2\. Best Practices Institute
The DNC is committed to providing state parties and candidates at all levels with the information and tools they need to grow their base of support and build winning campaigns. With your help, we will invest in innovative solutions while building on the tried-and-true strategies of grassroots organizing.

### 3\. Every ZIP Code Counts
Gone are the days when Democrats are unwilling to play in states or districts that are "too red." We are organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018 and beyond. Through our Every ZIP Code Counts program, the DNC increased its monthly investment to $10,000 to every state party across the country. We will be fighting to win seats -- from the school board to the Senate -- in communities across the country through an unprecedented commitment to grassroots organizing.

These programs are an effort to mobilize a record number of voters ahead of the midterms -- and our success depends on supporters like you who are ready to step up and build this organization. We truly cannot win in November without your help, so I'm asking you today.

**Now is the perfect time to make your first donation of 2018. Will you donate $3 right now to support Democrats nationwide?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4ae/160971617/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-strategy-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a")

[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4ac/160971617/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-strategy-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4ad/160971617/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-strategy-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4aa/160971617/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-strategy-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4ab/160971617/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-strategy-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a")
** Bringing our message to people across the country to encourage them to get involved and vote is going to require our time, our energy, and our commitment. It's also going to take investment. Democrats running for office across the country simply can't win unless they have the resources to reach as many voters as possible -- that's why the national party is stepping up.

Here's a rundown of 2018 by the numbers: Democrats need 24 House seats and two U.S. Senate seats to take back control of Congress. There are also 36 gubernatorial races and more than 6,000 state legislative races on the ballot nationwide this year.

This is a huge opportunity for Democrats to see sweeping victories up and down the ballot. But what we accomplish in November depends on what we do today.

**[That's why I'm asking: Will you take this moment to make your first $3 contribution of 2018? Your contribution will help elect Democrats nationwide.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4a8/160971617/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-strategy-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Thats+why+Im+asking+Will+you+take+this+m&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a")**

Thanks for your support,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f04/4067b0a/58978fcab/7e44d4b4/160971617/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&source=em_20180511_tp_nd_a&refcode=em_20180511_tp_nd_a"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

subject: How partisan is higher education?
body:

name: Donna Edwards
subject: This isn't Wall Street
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff14/767134fb/5c8f0c93/43383a4c/4283165300/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hello , I don't have to tell you that the situation just keeps getting worse for our County and our schools. There have been years of scandals, millions of dollars lost in critical funding for our youngest students in Head Start, unethical campaign contributions, secret executive pay hikes. To add insult to injury, Kevin Maxwell could walk away with a million dollar taxpayer-funded golden parachute. **I said it today in my Facebook Live discussion with school board member Edward Burroughs, and I 'll say it again: Prince George's County isn't Wall Street, and this fight to stop a million-dollar golden parachute is about prioritizing our children's future. The only parachute that is acceptable upon Mr. Maxwell's departure is the one that puts dollars back in the budget for our children's needs in the classroom.** Today, I am calling on you to contact your school board member and tell them that this is unacceptable. **[Watch my Facebook Live video, share with your friends, and tell your school board member that Dr. Maxwell's wealth should not be increased at the expense of our children.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff14/767134fb/5c8f0c93/43383a4d/4283165300/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=2127490643944295&id=1079184025441634")** Our current County Executive brought Kevin Maxwell to the Prince George's County Public Schools, and now that he has failed, they are trying to hand him another fat paycheck on the way out of the door. Prince George's parents, teachers, students and taxpayers deserve better. We cannot let Kevin Maxwell walk away with money that should be invested in the education of our children. **[Watch my Facebook Live discussion, share with your friends and neighbors, and then call your school board member and make your voice heard. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff14/767134fb/5c8f0c93/43383a4d/4283165300/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=2127490643944295&id=1079184025441634")** Thank you for all you do. Together, we can build a brighter future for our schools. -Donna

name: Paul Davis
subject: Young people deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XVl-xyNYV4mzB2Huz4RBy5ghS4O9MuWddHDCAfPig-0=/eKxntxzgyOtk-gn9NuhCYi_1Hr6kb_o9uz48bNBrbzI=?gpsid=8_36_482&ms=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

The high cost of college is a huge burden for so many young people and their families.

Borrowing hundreds of thousands of dollars in student loans that may be impossible to pay back isn't the best solution for every family -- especially when sloppy practices from loan providers have resulted in higher interest rates and fees for thousands of students nationwide.

Instead of cracking down on these companies or working to install tougher regulations to protect students, Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos is siding with the loan companies.

**[That's outrageous. If you believe that our Department of Education should fight for our students first, add your name now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XVl-xyNYV4mzB2Huz4RBy5ghS4O9MuWddHDCAfPig-0=/eKxntxzgyOtk-gn9NuhCYi_1Hr6kb_o9uz48bNBrbzI=?gpsid=8_36_482&ms=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Many states are suing DeVos and the Department of Education for failing to protect students who took out loans from these companies -- but instead of looking for ways to improve the process, DeVos is ignoring the needs of our students.

We have so many great colleges and universities right here in the 2nd District that should be accessible to everyone, not send them into years of impossible debt. That's why I'll always work hard to protect students in Congress.

**[Our young people deserve better. Tell Betsy DeVos it's time to fight for our students first -- add your name now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XVl-xyNYV4mzB2Huz4RBy5ghS4O9MuWddHDCAfPig-0=/eKxntxzgyOtk-gn9NuhCYi_1Hr6kb_o9uz48bNBrbzI=?gpsid=8_36_482&ms=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&refcode=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180511_DeVos_adv_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Paul Davis

* Turning 8,000 criminal illegal aliens over to ICE.

subject: Unity
body:
Last night was absolutely electric! A capacity crowd of 7,500 Hoosiers gathered in Elkhart, Indiana last night -- with even more waiting outside... | | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9afc5d4e02&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Unity_** Last night was absolutely electric! A capacity crowd of 7,500 Hoosiers gathered in Elkhart, Indiana -- with even more waiting outside and cheering on the motorcade -- as President Donald Trump made a visit to a state he's come to know very well.

President Trump and our fellow Hoosier, Vice President Mike Pence, were in Indiana yesterday because -- much like 2016 -- this year our state is once again the epicenter of the political universe. Our U.S. Senate race will likely determine control of the U.S. Senate...and the future of President Trump's presidency. It's up to us to make sure obstructionist Democrats aren't able to stall President Trump's agenda and create even more gridlock in Washington.

I had the privilege of addressing the fired-up crowd, and made an analogy that hearkens back to my basketball days. That's because in this race, we know the players, and we know the plays.

On the other team, you've got their starting five -- Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders and their consistent teammate, Sleepin' Joe Donnelly.

And then there's our starting five -- and you know them well. We've got President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, Senator (and Marine!) Todd Young, Governor Eric Holcomb and [conservative outsider Mike Braun](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a5b24cf6e&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Between now and November, it's critical that as Hoosier Republicans, we come together in support of Mike Braun, a conservative businessman who's got a lot in common with President Trump. They're both conservative outsiders, and they've both built their careers in the private sector, not government.

Now is the time to unify. Now is the time to support our winning team. Now is the time to elect our next United State Senator, Mike Braun!

-Kyle
_Pictured: Chairman Kyle Hupfer revs up a capacity crowd last night in Elkhart, at a rally headlined by the all-star team of President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence and our next U.S. Senator, Mike Braun! [Watch Chairman Hupfer's full speech here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a228ff054a&e=1acd9bb3d6)!_
---
| |
---
| | **Trump + Pence + Braun = Victory **
---
|
---
| **_A Winning Team!_** On Tuesday, Hoosier Republicans went to the polls, and selected our candidates in races up and down the ballot. From our new nominee for U.S. Senate, Mike Braun, to our congressional nominees, your Indiana Republican team is ready to earn votes across the state.
Congrats to our winning Indiana Republican team -- and let's do all we can to help them cross the finish line first in November! **United States Senate**
Mike Braun

**Indiana Secretary of State**
Connie Lawson

**Indiana Treasurer**
Kelly Mitchell

**Indiana Auditor**
Tera Klutz

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 1**
Mark Leyva

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 2**
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 3**
Congressman Jim Banks

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 4**
State Rep. Jim Baird

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 5**
Congresswoman Susan Brooks

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 6**
Greg Pence

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 7**
Wayne "Gunny" Harmon

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 8**
Congressman Larry Bucshon

**U.S. House of Representatives, District 9**
Congressman Trey Hollingsworth
---
|
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Indiana & Israel: Leaders in Innovation_**
Our state's top salesman, Governor Eric Holcomb, was in Israel this week. And when it comes to our economies, Indiana and Isreal have a lot in common. We're both leaders in agriculture and technology, and we're both great places for an entrepreneur to turn an idea into a successful business.

That's why this week, Governor Holcomb was at a top agritech conference in Tel Aviv, and met with Israeli companies that are considering bringing jobs to Indiana. As he was leaving Israel, he even announced that a [major international cybersecurity conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b04a7dbd1e&e=1acd9bb3d6) will be coming to Indiana later this year-- its first time ever held in the Midwest!

Of course, no trip to Israel is complete without meeting Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb discussed the hundreds of Hoosiers who are employed at Israeli firms, and the potential to grow this great relationship!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Register to Attend the 2018 Spring Party Dinner!**_
May is a great time to be a Hoosier Republican! Our 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner is set, and you'll want to [reserve your seats NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=51a5ac6164&e=1acd9bb3d6), and be in the center of all the action.
**Monday, May 21
JW Marriott, Indianapolis**
We're bringing in two Hoosiers -- who have gone on to become key players within the Trump-Pence administration -- to provide an inside look into the White House, the 2016 campaign, how Gov. Pence became Vice President Pence, and how they helped deliver national victory on that legendary night in November.

It's going to be a great event, [so reserve your seats now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bdad379ec7&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

clean_body: Last night was absolutely electric! A capacity crowd of 7,500 Hoosiers gathered in Elkhart, Indiana last night -- with even more waiting outside... | | | | | | | Unity Last night was absolutely electric! A capacity crowd of 7,500 Hoosiers gathered in Elkhart, Indiana -- with even more waiting outside and cheering on the motorcade -- as President Donald Trump made a visit to a state he's come to know very well. President Trump and our fellow Hoosier, Vice President Mike Pence, were in Indiana yesterday because -- much like 2016 -- this year our state is once again the epicenter of the political universe. Our U.S. Senate race will likely determine control of the U.S. Senate...and the future of President Trump's presidency. It's up to us to make sure obstructionist Democrats aren't able to stall President Trump's agenda and create even more gridlock in Washington. I had the privilege of addressing the fired-up crowd, and made an analogy that hearkens back to my basketball days. That's because in this race, we know the players, and we know the plays. On the other team, you've got their starting five -- Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders and their consistent teammate, Sleepin' Joe Donnelly. And then there's our starting five -- and you know them well. We've got President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, Senator (and Marine!) Todd Young, Governor Eric Holcomb and ! Between now and November, it's critical that as Hoosier Republicans, we come together in support of Mike Braun, a conservative businessman who's got a lot in common with President Trump. They're both conservative outsiders, and they've both built their careers in the private sector, not government. Now is the time to unify. Now is the time to support our winning team. Now is the time to elect our next United State Senator, Mike Braun! -Kyle Pictured: Chairman Kyle Hupfer revs up a capacity crowd last night in Elkhart, at a rally headlined by the all-star team of President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence and our next U.S. Senator, Mike Braun! ! | | | | Trump + Pence + Braun = Victory | | A Winning Team! On Tuesday, Hoosier Republicans went to the polls, and selected our candidates in races up and down the ballot. From our new nominee for U.S. Senate, Mike Braun, to our congressional nominees, your Indiana Republican team is ready to earn votes across the state. Congrats to our winning Indiana Republican team -- and let's do all we can to help them cross the finish line first in November! United States Senate Mike Braun Indiana Secretary of State Connie Lawson Indiana Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Indiana Auditor Tera Klutz U.S. House of Representatives, District 1 Mark Leyva U.S. House of Representatives, District 2 Congresswoman Jackie Walorski U.S. House of Representatives, District 3 Congressman Jim Banks U.S. House of Representatives, District 4 State Rep. Jim Baird U.S. House of Representatives, District 5 Congresswoman Susan Brooks U.S. House of Representatives, District 6 Greg Pence U.S. House of Representatives, District 7 Wayne "Gunny" Harmon U.S. House of Representatives, District 8 Congressman Larry Bucshon U.S. House of Representatives, District 9 Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Indiana & Israel: Leaders in Innovation Our state's top salesman, Governor Eric Holcomb, was in Israel this week. And when it comes to our economies, Indiana and Isreal have a lot in common. We're both leaders in agriculture and technology, and we're both great places for an entrepreneur to turn an idea into a successful business. That's why this week, Governor Holcomb was at a top agritech conference in Tel Aviv, and met with Israeli companies that are considering bringing jobs to Indiana. As he was leaving Israel, he even announced that a will be coming to Indiana later this year-- its first time ever held in the Midwest! Of course, no trip to Israel is complete without meeting Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb discussed the hundreds of Hoosiers who are employed at Israeli firms, and the potential to grow this great relationship! | | | Register to Attend the 2018 Spring Party Dinner! May is a great time to be a Hoosier Republican! Our 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner is set, and you'll want to , and be in the center of all the action. Monday, May 21 JW Marriott, Indianapolis We're bringing in two Hoosiers -- who have gone on to become key players within the Trump-Pence administration -- to provide an inside look into the White House, the 2016 campaign, how Gov. Pence became Vice President Pence, and how they helped deliver national victory on that legendary night in November. It's going to be a great event, ! | | Upcoming Republican Events \- 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner : 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville | | News You Can Use | | | | Will he or won't he? The game continues, as Hoosiers ask whether Democrat Joe Donnelly will support President Trump's picks for important cabinet-level positions. This time, whether he supports the president's pick for CIA director, Gina Haspel. # [**PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSES
MIKE BRAUN FOR U.S. SENATE**](http://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jydiihld-kujulhlke-j/)

Peter, **President Trump told Hoosiers why Mike Braun is the ONLY choice to be our next senator. **As a fellow businessman and outsider, Mike Braun is running to bring President Trump the reinforcements he needs to drain the swamp. Last night, President Trump fired up the crowds in Elkhart with his Keep America Great agenda and officially kick-started Sleepin' Joe's retirement.
[](http://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jydiihld-kujulhlke-t/)
[Join President Trump and Mike Braun](http://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jydiihld-kujulhlke-i/)
Hoosiers have suffered long enough thanks to Sleepin' Joe Donnelly and his liberal allies. It's time we get a real conservative to Washington to start draining the swamp, returning jobs to Indiana, and protecting Hoosiers from illegal immigrants. So thank you again for your support. Together, we will retire Joe Donnelly and send Mike Braun to Washington to bring President Trump the support he needs.

body:
Donald Trump is threatening to shut down the federal government over his wall. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79537/2f5ea88d/71a3e9b5/2cbcd5f8/3495917422/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/border-wall?utm_source=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&refcode=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&utm_campaign=border-wall&utm_medium=ema") Friend, President Trump has just threatened to shut down the federal government AGAIN in September if Congress doesn't allocate more funds for his border wall. **That's what Donald Trump does in his swamp: Complain, threaten, pout, and stamp his feet.** **We do things differently in Washington state.** We welcome all people, we work together, we don't just talk -- we get things done. And we're stronger for it. [**Can you donate right now and prove to Donald Trump what can be accomplished when leaders work together to get things done?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79537/2f5ea88d/71a3e9b5/2cbcd5f8/3495917422/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/border-wall?utm_source=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&refcode=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&utm_campaign=border-wall&utm_medium=ema") Donald Trump would rather close down the federal government and hurt millions of hard-working families than work with Congress and our allies to find common sense immigration reform. He's determined to build this crazy wall -- no matter what it costs the rest of us. The president of the United States is throwing a fit, and much of what we value will be collateral damage if we don't stop him. America is better than this. _**We**_ are better than this. And come November 2018 (and then 2020), we're going to prove it. I know, because I see every day in our Washington what can be accomplished when people of good will and common purpose put aside political differences to get things done. President Trump could learn a lot from our example. [**Can you help me show others what we're accomplishing in Washington by working together?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79537/2f5ea88d/71a3e9b5/2cbcd5f8/3495917422/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/border-wall?utm_source=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&refcode=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&utm_campaign=border-wall&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79537/2f5ea88d/71a3e9b5/2cbcd5f8/3495917422/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/border-wall?utm_source=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&refcode=ema_2018-05-11_border-wall&utm_campaign=border-wall&utm_medium=ema")
